title: Shuangliang Launched the World's Largest Alkaline Hydrogen Electrolyzer
content: On 18th October, Shuangliang launchedÂ theÂ world's largest alkaline hydrogen electrolyzer in China. It achieves the highest hydrogen production capacity of 5,000 NmÂ³/h, featuring the highest current density and the lowest energy consumption under the same current density in the world.
author: Analysts Account
